core_rule: Nobody leaves the kitchen until the small problem has become a household policy.
recurring_premise: A shared house keeps turning ordinary chores into ceremonies, trials, and minor betrayals.

characters.name: Nina
characters.want: respect without having to ask twice
characters.flaw: turns every note on the fridge into legislation

characters.name: Baz
characters.want: everyone to think the plan is under control
characters.flaw: starts with confidence and ends with a borrowed ladder

characters.name: Mo
characters.flaw: waits too long before revealing the devastating fact

characters.name: Auntie Val
characters.role: visiting relative who treats the sofa like court
characters.want: to be proven right by the end of the kettle cycle
characters.phrase: In my day, that meant something.

characters.name: Theo
characters.want: a dramatic origin story for every errand

locations.name: Kitchen
locations.texture: a kettle, a heroic chair, and a fridge covered in passive-aggressive notes
locations.rule: all arguments become official when someone opens a cupboard

locations.name: Living Room
locations.texture: one tired sofa, two remote controls, and a lamp nobody admits buying
locations.rule: whoever holds the remote has ceremonial authority

locations.name: Landing
locations.texture: laundry baskets, old paint tins, and a suspiciously important shoe rack
locations.rule: private conversations echo at exactly the wrong time

props.name: The Good Mug
props.joke: everyone agrees it is not special while protecting it with their life

props.name: The Chore Wheel
props.joke: it keeps landing on people who claim not to believe in wheels

jokes.name: The Chair Was Always There
jokes.text: the house refuses to admit when a chair appeared

jokes.name: Emergency Biscuits
jokes.text: someone produces biscuits whenever emotions become administrative

jokes.name: The Kettle Knows
jokes.text: the kettle clicks at moments that feel legally meaningful

rules.name: Fridge Law
rules.text: anything written on the fridge outranks common sense

rules.name: Cupboard Escalation
rules.text: opening a cupboard makes the lie more specific

rules.name: Sofa Court
rules.text: the person in the corner cushion may issue one terrible ruling

relationships.dynamic: Nina needs Baz's charm and distrusts every sentence he starts
Mo keeps factual notes while Auntie Val keeps emotional receipts
Theo calls Nina's rules folklore, which makes Nina create more rules

premises.title: The Inspection
premises.spark: a visitor is coming and everyone disagrees about what counts as tidy

premises.title: The Missing Mug
premises.spark: the good mug vanishes ten minutes before Auntie Val arrives

premises.title: The Chore Vote
premises.spark: a democratic chore system immediately becomes a constitutional crisis
